title: Seventy-six  new cases of COVID-19 in the YK Delta September 10–16
summary: During the week of September 10-16, YKHC reports 76 new cases of COVID-19 in the YK Delta. title: Chugachmiut Recovery Camp
summary: Join us this November for our next Recovery Camp in Port Graham, Alaska. Call Eydie at 907-602-8644 for more information or to get an application. The post Chugachmiut Recovery Camp first appeared on Chugachmiut .

title: Northern Bering Sea Research Area
summary: The Northern Bering Sea Research Area (NBSRA) was implemented in 2008, as part of Amendment 89 to the BSAI Groundfish FMP, and required the development of a management plan to identify areas where nonpelagic trawl fishing would be allowed, pursuant to a scientific research plan. title: Typhoon Merbok, fueled by unusually warm Pacific Ocean, pounded Alaska’s vulnerable coastal communities at a critical time
summary: The powerful remnants of Typhoon Merbok pounded Alaska’s western coast on Sept. 17, 2022, pushing homes off their foundations and tearing apart protective berms as water flooded communities. Storms aren’t unusual here, but Merbok built up over unusually warm water. Its waves reached 50 feet over the Bering Sea, and its storm surge sent water levels into communities at near record highs along with near hurricane-force winds. Merbok also hit during the fall subsistence harvest season, when the region’s Indigenous communities are stocking up food for the winter. Rick Thoman, a climate scientist at IARC , explained why the storm was unusual and th...
